response.justification: While the candidate possesses over 15 years of hands-on software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background, they lack the Director-level strategic leadership and deep, recognized AI expertise required for this Principal role. Their background is primarily in full-stack and backend development, with only recent exposure to AI tooling, which falls short of the enterprise cloud strategy and strategic customer advisory focus needed.
strengths: Over 15 years of versatile software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background as a platform founder
Strong hands-on builder fluency across multiple stacks
concerns: Lacks deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML products
Scope is primarily hands-on development rather than Director-level strategy
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers
